name: Divi (Elegant Themes)
description: Divi — WordPress page builder by Elegant Themes with visual drag-and-drop design and custom post type support.

seo.title: Divi (Elegant Themes) — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Divi (Elegant Themes): Divi — WordPress page builder by Elegant Themes with visual drag-and-drop design and custom post type support.

when_to_use: Drag-and-drop WordPress page building without coding
Marketing landing page creation with pre-built layout library
WooCommerce storefront design with visual builder
Rapid WordPress site building for agencies and freelancers
Visual editing with custom CSS for advanced WordPress sites

pros: Lifetime license is rare and useful
cons: Lock-in if you ever leave Divi
review.verdict: A practical WordPress builder for agencies, but not really backend-as-a-service despite the listing.
review.best_for: WordPress agencies building brochure and marketing sites fast
review.not_for: Developers wanting lean, performant, non-shortcode themes

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Monthly subscription, no evidence of peak-lock
